info.title: Elchi API Gateway
info.description: API Gateway docs for all microservice routes

branch_id.description: Branch ID (manager HYBRID flowda avtomatik aniqlanadi)
Branch ID (manager flowda avtomatik aniqlanadi, yuborish shart emas)

commission_type.description: Operator commission type. percent → % of order total_price; fixed → flat per sold order.

commission_value.description: Commission value (percent number or fixed amount).

expense_proof_conditions.description: Isbot (rasm/video) majburiy bo‘ladigan vaziyatlar to‘plami. Bo‘sh = isbot talab qilinmaydi.
Isbot (rasm/video) majburiy bo‘ladigan vaziyatlar to‘plami. Bo‘sh massiv = isbotni butunlay o‘chiradi.

refreshToken.description: Optional fallback. Normally refresh token is read from httpOnly cookie.

image.description: Product rasmi. Berilsa gateway uni avtomatik yuklab, `image_url`ni o'zi to'ldiradi.

image_url.description: Ixtiyoriy. Agar `image` yuborilsa bu maydonni yuborish shart emas.

market_id.description: Admin/Superadmin yuboradi. MARKET role uchun token sub ishlatiladi.

image.description: Product rasmi. Berilsa gateway uni avtomatik yuklab, `image_url`ni o'zi to'ldiradi.

image_url.description: Ixtiyoriy. Agar `image` yuborilsa bu maydonni yuborish shart emas.

market_id.description: Market ID (admin/superadmin/reg uchun majburiy, market rolida token’dan olinadi)
Market ID (admin/superadmin/reg uchun majburiy, market rolida token’dan olinadi)

proofFileKeys.description: Xarajat isboti uchun yuklangan fayl kalitlari (rasm/video). Market isbot talab qilsa va extraCost > 0 bo'lsa majburiy.

reason.example: Mijoz uyda yo'q edi, ertaga qayta urinish so'radi

proofFileKeys.description: Xarajat isboti uchun yuklangan fayl kalitlari (rasm/video). Market sotishda isbot talab qilsa va extraCost > 0 bo'lsa majburiy.

comment.example: Branch managerdan HQ main kassaga o'tkazma

amount.description: Signed amount: positive = income, negative = expense. Match the sign to source_type.

context.description: Flat context interpolated into the provider dispatch body_template ({{field}}). e.g. { customer_phone, total_price, idempotency_key }

order_ids.description: Specific order ids to settle. Omit to settle pending receivables oldest-first up to amount.

orderIds.description: Qabul qilinadigan batch ichidagi order ID'lar

reason.example: Noto'g'ri viloyat tanlangan, paket noto'g'ri yo'naltirilgan

content.example:
Customer: Ali Valiyev
Amount: 120000
Status: paid
